name: Duneshade Outpost
identity: Fortified hot-edge outpost where route captains, water-ration families, and predator-watch crews hold the desertward lanes of the Unternal supply belt.
approach: Low walls, shade sails, cistern towers, and signal posts mark a settlement built to survive heat, scarcity, and sudden attack.
inside: Barracks, cistern courts, beast pens, relay sheds, and ration offices dominate a hard practical interior.
who_is_out_of_place: anyone who treats water law as negotiable
expected_behavior: show deference to whichever family or captain controls your shelter lane
faith: hardy frontier observances focus on endurance, safe passage, and returning people and cargo alive
seasonal_change: heat spikes and southern predator pressure can turn the outpost from checkpoint to siege posture within days.
law_context: water, shade, and safe passage are communal assets rationed through hard local enforcement

sensory_surface.detail: Low walls, shade sails, cistern towers, and signal posts mark a settlement built to survive heat, scarcity, and sudden attack.
Barracks, cistern courts, beast pens, relay sheds, and ration offices dominate a hard practical interior.

social_expectation_surface.detail: show deference to whichever family or captain controls your shelter lane

public_behavior_texture: People who belong here are usually route guards, water crews, beast handlers, and public conduct is read through expectations such as report hazards quickly, respect ration order.
visible_power_signals: Ordinary decisions are visibly shaped by route captains, rationing families, frontier stewards.
local_tension_surface: The place feels stable only until pressures such as water scarcity, subterranean predators, convoy delay begin showing through daily routines.
differentiator: Duneshade Outpost stands apart because its economy leans on route defense, water control; public faith remains visible through hardy frontier observances focus on endurance, safe passage, and returning people and cargo alive; outsiders are noticed fastest when they resemble wastrels, the underprepared.
encounter_rhythm: Most first scenes in Duneshade Outpost begin through frontier outpost rhythms: arrival, observation, minor correction, and only then deeper access.
scene_openers: A first arrival at Duneshade Outpost immediately highlights fortified hot-edge outpost where route captains, water-ration families, and predator-watch crews hold the desertward lanes of the unternal supply belt
The quickest social read of Duneshade Outpost comes from how locals react to report hazards quickly / respect ration order.
social_misstep_examples: Treating Duneshade Outpost like a casual stop rather than a governed space.
Ignoring local expectation to report hazards quickly; respect ration order.
low_grade_conflict_triggers: A queue, toll, or inspection dispute tied to route defense.
A local intermediary resents outsider assumptions about Duneshade Outpost.
institutional_escalation_path: Workshop or neighborhood correction in Duneshade Outpost
Escalation into law, tariff, or faction attention if ignored
outsider_advantage: Outsiders can sometimes notice pressure fractures in Duneshade Outpost before residents admit them.
outsider_liability: Outsiders in Duneshade Outpost are judged quickly by whether they understand its governing rhythms.
public_complication_table: A minor official wants paperwork clarified.
A public argument exposes pressure around water scarcity.
Someone mistakes the party for agents tied to route captains.
A delay at a gate, quay, shrine, or market creates heat.
A small errand reveals a larger local imbalance.
private_pressure_table: A household or guild contact is quietly overextended.
A local fixer asks for help with a contained problem.
A hidden cost behind route defense surfaces.
A trusted intermediary is being watched.
A faith, law, or trade obligation has slipped.
A personal favor could become a faction debt.

arrival_variants_by_time.dawn: At dawn, Duneshade Outpost feels procedural and watchful as daily rhythms set.
arrival_variants_by_time.midday: By midday, Duneshade Outpost is busiest and least forgiving of confusion.
arrival_variants_by_time.night: At night, Duneshade Outpost reveals who really moves after formal structures thin out.

recent_local_change_signal: Locals in Duneshade Outpost mention that something small but important has changed in the last few weeks, even if they refuse to name it directly.
